headline: Close the gap: skip snacking, start rowing
summary: Today you eliminate emotional snacking and complete 45 minutes of rowing to begin narrowing your 0.56 kg/week deficit.
details: Eat only Huel, vegetables, and planned meals today—zero snacking during programming breaks or otherwise. Row for 45 minutes (split 2×25 min if needed) to build momentum and burn significant kilojoules. You're 1,651 days behind; this Wednesday marks when you shift from -0.04 to closing on -0.60 kg/week.
